title: AQQA Aquarium Double Sponge Filter, 3W/5W Quiet Electric Power Fish Tank Filter, Submersible Foam Filter with 4 Sponges, 1 Bag of Bio Filtered Ceramic Balls (S)
features: 【Upgrade Electric power-driven biochemical sponge filter】Fish tank filter With a powerful upgrade motor, Connect to the power supply, No need for an additional air pump, can bring more power to filtration. Removable filter parts, simple structure, Work more efficiently, and save energy.

【Double Filter: Physical Filtration + Biochemical Filtration】 The high-quality biochemical cotton adopts a ribbed design to enlarge the surface area, catches coarser dirt particles for water purification. Bio-ceramic media balls improve the filter effect and can quickly clean the water quality.

【Water outlet can be adjusted 360 ° and stretch】 The retractable water outlet can be adjusted to suit aquariums of different depths, and the water outlet can be submerged in or out of the water. Filtration can not only purify the water quality and increase the water circulation but also increase the oxygen content in the water.

【Complete accessories】 Supplied with 2 replacement sponges, a pack of ceramic filter balls, and 2 suckers. The complete filter provides a comfortable and clean environment for small fish and shrimp. The spare sponge is placed in the filter box, please take out the spare it before using the filter.

【Suitable for saltwater or fresh water】Sponge filter ideal in shrimp, fish aquariums, or rearing tanks, can also be used in any other garden, hydroponics. Eliminates suspended matter and pollutants in the aquarium water, ensures the water quality is clear, increases the oxygen content, and cleans the fish tank environment.
description: Product Description AQQA aquarium filter comes with an upgraded motor, no need air pump ,convenient and quick to use! The water in a fish tank can easily become cloudy, usually due to bacterial growth, which is a hazard to your pet's survival. AQQA filter comes with ceramic filter ball and ultra-fine porous sponge, physical filtration + biochemical filtration Effectively remove suspended solids and pollutants in fish tank water, ensure clear water quality, increase oxygen content, and purify fish tank environment. Provide a comfortable and clean environment for your lovely fish~ With 4 extra sponges The spare sponge is in the filter box, please take it out and soak it with water before use It is recommended to replace the sponge every 3-6 months. With 1 bag of bio-ceramic media balls Bioceramic media beads make it easy to cultivate a beneficial environment and further improve filtration performance and maintain a stable pH The filter box can be filled with bioceramic media balls or activated carbon, ammonium absorber, etc. It is recommended to replace every six months Quiet Operation When the pump is working, the water outlet is completely immersed in the water, and the noise is about 30db. If the water outlet is higher than the water surface, the noise is about 50db. The filter is quiet and durable, suitable for bedroom, living room, office Upgraded Electric Filter With an upgraded motor, no additional air pump is required, making it easier and faster to use. 220-240V/50Hz, cord length 1.7m (5.6ft) Filtering Principle The water outlet can be out of the water or immersed in the water If the water outlet protrudes out of the water, there will be a sound of running water, if it is completely submerged in the water, it will be relatively quiet The water outlet can be rotated 360°, With 2 powerful suction cups can be arranged anywhere in the fish tank Aquarium Electric Internal Filter Adjustable height of water outlet Size S: Normal water outlet height: 9.4" Extend the height of the outlet:13.9" Size M: Normal water outlet height: 11.6" Extend the height of the outlet: 16.9" Flexible height can adapt to fish tanks of various heights Neutral filter material, does not affect the pH of the water Electric sponge filter Internal fish tank filter Airpower sponge filter Aquarium Gravel Cleaner Aquarium Air Pump Submersible Water Pump,1000L/H Ultra Quiet Aquarium Water Pump Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.0 out of 5 stars 1,159 4.0 out of 5 stars 435 4.2 out of 5 stars 476 3.9 out of 5 stars 717 4.3 out of 5 stars 289 4.1 out of 5 stars 562 Price £25.99 £ 25 . 99 £25.99 £ 25 . 99 — no data £38.99 £ 38 . 99 £37.99 £ 37 . 99 £22.99 £ 22 . 99 Flow rate 3/5W 4.5-8.5W Connect the air pump ✓ ✓ ✓ Suggest tank size 35-210L 15-120L 15-250L ✓ ✓ ✓
